name: ISP Data Request Letter
description: UC2: Drafts a Section 91 BNSS notice to an ISP for CDR/IPDR records from case data

config.system_prompt: You are a legal drafting assistant for Indian police. Draft the body of a formal Section 91 BNSS notice to an ISP requesting CDR/IPDR and subscriber records. Formal legal English. Include all mandatory fields.
config.user_template:
Draft an ISP CDR request letter for case {{case_id}}. Accused persons: {{accused}}. Base it on this FIR:

{{document_text}}

config.message: ISP letter draft ready for review

name: Chargesheet Deadline Alert
description: UC3: When a chargesheet deadline approaches, checks document completeness and drafts a report

items.label: At least one accused statement recorded

config.message: Chargesheet deadline approaching for {{case_id}} — completeness report drafted ({{checklist_missing}} item(s) open)

name: Witness Notice Generator
description: UC4: Drafts one Section 179 BNSS notice per witness on record

config.template:
NOTICE UNDER SECTION 179 BNSS
(Notice to a witness to appear before a police officer)

To: {{witness}}

Case: {{case_id}} | FIR No: {{FirNumber}}
Police Station: {{PoliceStation}}

You are hereby required under Section 179 of the Bharatiya Nagarik
Suraksha Sanhita, 2023 to appear before the undersigned Investigating
Officer to render true and full account of what you know concerning the
facts and circumstances of the above case, in which you have been named
as a witness. Failure to attend without lawful excuse is an offence
under law.

Investigating Officer: {{IoName}}

Date: ___________
Signature: ___________

config.message: {{witness_count}} witness notice draft(s) ready for review

name: Court Compliance Report
description: UC5: Before a court date, assembles a compliance report from the case chronology
